rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel United Airlines, Inc. To Appear And Produce Documents At Deposition, And Request For Sanctions Against United And Or Its Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel United Airlines, Inc. to appear and produce documents at deposition and request for sanctions was continued on the court¿s own motion from October 12 to October 26 based on the representations that United¿s deposition and document production would occur by October 18. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before October 26, then by 4:30pm on October 25 plaintiffs and United must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION And Notice Of Motion To Compel The Depositions Of The Person Most Qualified And Custodian Of Records Of Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel the depositions of the person most qualified and custodian of records of defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospitals was continued on the court¿s own motion from October 12 to October 26 to allow the parties to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on October 25 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: GEORGE PATTERSON et al VS. ALTA BUILDING MATERIALS CO. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospital¿S Further Responses To Plaintiffs¿ Special Interrogatories, And Further Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents And Requests For Admission; And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Kaiser Foundation Hospital¿s further responses to plaintiffs¿ special interrogatories, requests for production and requests for admissions, and for sanctions was continued on the court¿s own motion from October 12 to October 26 to allow the parties to further meet and confer. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4:30pm on October 25 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, which issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing at 9:15am on October 26. = (503/TLJ)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc. To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 26, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 3. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel defendant Golden Gate Drywall, Inc. to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition is granted. The 1995 deposition in In Re Complex Asbestos Litigation of Golden Gate Drywall, Inc.¿s then person most knowledgeable and custodian of records did not cover the job sites at issue in this case and the motives of Plaintiffs¿ counsel during that deposition regarding the job sites were not the same. Plaintiffs¿ request for sanctions against Golden Gate Drywall is granted. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:15am. = (503/TLJ)
